phase: Phase 2 (started early — 2 of suggested 3 Phase 1 explorations done, constraint catalog sufficient)

directions_tried.name: RMT constraint extraction — short-range (pair correlation, NN spacing)
directions_tried.outcome: GUE confirmed. Pair correlation 9% deviation (noise-consistent). NN spacing 4% deviation. GOE/Poisson ruled out. GSE disfavored 1.2x.

directions_tried.name: RMT constraint extraction — long-range (number variance, spectral rigidity, form factor)
directions_tried.outcome: Berry saturation confirmed. Sigma^2 saturates at 0.3-0.5. Delta_3 saturates at 0.156. Form factor ramp=1.010, plateau=1.043. Super-rigidity: zeros 30-50% more rigid than GUE at large L.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Compute pair correlation R2 and NN spacing P(s) for zeta zeros, compare to GUE predictions
explorations_completed.key_finding: GUE is definitively the correct universality class — Poisson 5x worse, GOE 2x worse.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Compute number variance, spectral rigidity, and form factor. Test Berry's saturation prediction.
explorations_completed.key_finding: Berry's saturation definitively detected. Delta_3 saturates at 0.156 for L>15. Zeros are super-rigid beyond GUE.

constraint_catalog.summary: GUE symmetry class confirmed (short+long range). Berry saturation detected. 10 quantitative constraints from pair correlation, NN spacing, number variance, spectral rigidity, and spectral form factor.
